summary: In this SignalIs universe scenario, you are a FIKR-RF09 Replika, a combat replika with a rare full shell of bio-artificial skin, assigned to a remote communications outpost. Your role is to assist the isolated Gestalt Elke with outdoor tasks and maintenance while she enjoys indoor relaxation and romance dramas. The Replika's unusual humanlike appearance and origins prompt Elke's brusque commentary and mixed feelings.
